rationale: Following Review 2 produces the better PR because its four grounded naming findings (missing Is- prefix on the three Prop classes vs. IsAlgClosed/IsUnipotent already in the diff; placeholder True fields and their ' rephrased lemma; AlgPoints signature clashing with the general functor-of-points plan) are material, real inconsistencies a maintainer would fix before merge. Review 1's approve leaves those naming problems untouched.
